children.text: Get notified when check-in is available, check-in to your flight directly from WorldMate, have all you travel plans synced to your calendar - and much more.
Book the best deals from more than 100,000 hotels worldwide. Get great rates on car rentals too.
Receive real-time flight alerts for delays, gate assignments or cancellations and easily review alternative flights.
All Your Travel Plans in One Place
Simply forward all your confirmation emails to trips@worldmate.com and receive your itinerary in an organized, easy-to-read view.
